titleStmt.title: SII 27.179: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 179. (A.R. No. 38 of 1938-39.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the second prākāra of Raṅganātha temple.

This undated record invokes the god to endow untainted devotion, happiness and bliss on Hullarasa-Liṅgaya-Dēvarāya who made over the golden vessels presented to the god by the king, and had the inscription engraved. The vessels etc., referred to herein are detailed in No. 178 above, in continuation of which this record has engraved and probably on the same date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yī ciṁnada svarūpagaḷanū svāmi Acutadēvarāya mahārāyarū taṁma Ubhayavāgi
śrīraṁganātha dēvarige samarpisi kaḷuhacittaisalāgi koḍubaṁdu śrī raṁganātha dēvarige svāmi
nirūpa pramāṇisalu samarpisi śilāśāsanavanū baradaṁthā hullarasa liṁgayadēvarāyage
śrī raṁganāthadēvaru Acuta bhaktiyanu Acuta bhuktiyanu Acuta muktiyanu
koṭṭu rakṣasali ... kṛṣṇārpaṇamastu ...
Digital edition of SII 27.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
